titles.title: A resolution expressing support for the designation of the week of April 6 through April 10, 2026, as "National Assistant Principals Week".
A resolution expressing support for the designation of the week of April 6 through April 10, 2026, as "National Assistant Principals Week".

action.text: Referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
